name: Olivia
description: A blonde-haired, blue-eyed girl who transferred into [Hanako](https://anilist.co/character/126452/)'s midde school. name: Sylpha
description: Lloyd's loyal maid, who serves the Kingdom of Saloum. In charge of his education and his protection. Has mastery with a blade that adventurers envy, along with the alias "The Silver Blade Princess." Seems very kind at first, but rigorous when it comes to training with a sword. name: Lust
description: Lust is a Homunculus, nicknamed the "Ultimate Spear", and one of the first antagonists in the Fullmetal Alchemist series. Lust is also usually partnered with Gluttony to whom she appears to have a particular almost motherly closeness. name: Noriko Takaya
description: Noriko Takaya is the daughter of the famous spaceship commander Yuzo Takaya. Since her childhood Noriko would like to follow her father's steps... Unfortunately, admiral Takaya died during a battle against alien forces when Noriko was still a young girl. At the age of 16, Noriko decides to attend the Okynawa High School for girls willing to become pilots but she is not so good with the control of the robots... Kazumi's suggestions turn out to be very useful to make Noriko trust her own abilities
